creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm planning to update editors/emacs and editors/emacs-devel ports
which will require update of ${PORTSDIR}/Mk/bsd.emacs.mk, as they keep
their latest version numbers in ${PORTSDIR}/Mk/bsd.emacs.mk.

Before proceeding with the update, I would like to request an -exp run.

The diffs to be tested are attached in Fix section. Please let me know
if I missed anything.

Thanks
